title: jasminum tomentosum
intro: Jasminum tomentosum, also known as the woolly jasmine or hairy jasmine, is a flowering plant species in the family Oleaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Jasminum tomentosum include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, teas, and ointments, and its essential oil is extracted for use in aromatherapy and skincare products.
